name: io.github.rodrigoGA/sourcescout-mcp
title: SourceScout MCP
description: Read-only multi-repository code search, file inspection, Probe, and Git history over HTTP.

runtimeArguments.name: --publish
runtimeArguments.description: Expose the local SourceScout HTTP endpoint.

host_port.description: Host port for the SourceScout MCP HTTP endpoint.

runtimeArguments.name: --mount
runtimeArguments.description: Mount the SourceScout projects configuration file.

config_path.description: Path to a SourceScout projects.yml file.

runtimeArguments.name: --mount
runtimeArguments.description: Mount the persistent SourceScout workspace directory.

workspace_path.description: Directory used for cloned repositories and SourceScout state.
